option.label: 银行对账未达账项调整

option.label: 本年利润结转未分配利润

column.name: acctSchemaId
column.displayName: 账套(空表示所有账套通用)

column.name: paymentItemId
column.displayName: 付款/收款项(invoice or payment item)

column.name: parentScenarioId
